title: CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to organizations that offer substance use programs, including inpatient and outpatient treatment, and a peer drop-in center. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Adults experiencing substance use disorder issues Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Some services available evenings and weekends. (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-2288 CATT INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Age Peer Networking Substance Use Disorder Referrals Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
